units.title: Projects involving Design, Development, Assembly, Performance Analysis or Case Studies in core

topics.topic: Generate and develop innovative ideas based on electrical and electronics engineering principles
Identify, define and analyze engineering problems related to the project
Gather and interpret relevant technical information from various sources
Evaluate alternative solutions or design approaches
Apply appropriate engineering concepts to develop and implement the project
Use laboratory equipment, hardware, software and simulation tools proficiently
Demonstrate skills in measurement, testing and troubleshooting
Interpret results effectively and draw valid technical conclusions
Demonstrate innovative thinking and entrepreneurial approach in developing project solutions 2. Communication and Reporting

Communicate technical ideas and project outcomes clearly through oral and written forms
Present project content in a structured, logical and coherent manner
Prepare professional technical reports and documentation
Use appropriate digital tools (e.g., PowerPoint, simulation demos) for effective presentations
Communicate project outcomes effectively to academic, industry, and societal audiences. 218 3. Teamwork and Leadership
Core and emerging areas include
Renewable Energy Systems (e.g., solar/wind micro-projects)
IoT-based Electrical Monitoring and Smart Control
Automation using PLCs, Arduino or Microcontrollers
Power Electronics Applications (converters, inverters, drives)
Electrical Safety and Energy Auditing
Any other innovative project relevant to electrical and electronics engineering. 219
